patch.value: GH-250: pm close validates close-reason before item existence

pm close checks governance.require_close_reason before verifying the target item exists, so a typo'd id with no reason reports 'Close reason text is required' instead of 'Item not found'. Validate existence before the close-reason gate in runClose (and keep close-many consistent).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: GH-250 fix: runClose now locates the target item (buildItemNotFoundError) BEFORE normalizeCloseReason, so a typo'd id with no reason reports 'Item not found' instead of the misleading 'Close reason text is required'. close-many needs no change (ids come from a matched list, never user-typed). File: cli/commands/close.ts.

patch.value: Locate item via buildItemNotFoundError before normalizeCloseReason.
Missing id with no reason reports not-found, not close-reason-required
Implemented in close.ts; new GH-250 close test green.
pm close validates item existence before the close-reason gate, so typo'd ids report 'Item not found' immediately.
